title: Mushy Morning Vietnamese Cannellini Beans Pasta
description: A creative and umami-rich brunch dish featuring cannellini beans in a glassy-jelly pasta water emulsion, all under 500 calories and glycemic-friendly. Perfect for a satisfying Saturday morning.
instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling, salted water until al dente.

In a blender or food processor, combine rice vinegar, unsweetened coconut water, vegetable oil, chopped scallions, minced ginger, chopped cilantro, kaffir lime leaves, grated daikon radish, fine salt, and black pepper.
Blend the mixture on high speed until a smooth, emulsified sauce forms.
In a skillet, heat 10g of the sauce over medium heat, then add the cooked pasta and toss to coat, adding more sauce as needed.
Add the cannellini beans to the skillet and toss with the pasta and sauce to combine, until heated through.
Serve the pasta hot, topped with additional sauce and chopped scallions if desired.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and kaffir lime leaves, if desired.
Season with additional fine salt and black pepper, if needed.
